vr_mode_category.description: Spend Insight generated by integrated minds, and manage the nanobot systems that grew out of the same platform.
vr_mode_category.strategy_tip: Coordination bandwidth limits how many of these actions can run at once: 2 at first, rising with Integrated population to a maximum of 6 at one million Integrated. When over the limit, the highest-numbered actions shut off first. The Phage Protocol is exempt.

vr_mode_category.description: Where Insight asks, Dominion takes. The livestock is raw material: conscripted mass rendered into internal robotics, nanobot swarms, and combat power far past anything the Insight menu will give you. The population you spend does not come back.
vr_mode_category.strategy_tip: Only meaningful once you have committed to coercive Integration; its actions consume Integrated Humans as fuel and are invisible on the voluntary path. Combat and Grey Goo scale harder here than in the Insight menu, at the cost of the herd.
